productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Adi Fiero Low White Grey Pink Shoe
description: Designed for the fiery, the Adi Fiero is a great training shoe. Stylish and comfortable, it also doubles up as a classic lifestyle shoe that can be paired with jeans and t-shirts for that casual look.UpperMesh upper with synthetic overlays for enhanced brethability and extended durabilityPatent three synthetic overlays across the sides of the upper for added structure to the shoe and signifying brand's motto of performance, perseverance and achievementSynthetic central lacing for snug FitPlush padding on collar and tongue for comfort and snug fitSoft fabric shoe lining and cushioned insole for comfortable in-step feel and to provide all-day comfortMidsoleEngineered with Adiprene technology to provide ample cushioning to the feet and protect them from impactEVA injected midsole for lightweight comfortLightly cushioned insole for lightweight feelOutsoleCarbon rubber outsole with horizontal flex grooves for added tractionOutsole built with impact guidance system to guide the natural movement of the feet Adiwear outsole for better abrasion resistance during Sports performed on hard surfaces, providing improved traction and durabilityCarbon rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box to protect the forefootWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
